controlsConfirmed.evidence: The new desktop backend bridge stays in command/cloud.rs and is only registered from lib.rs; no lower layer imports command/UI code.
Session logout branches on cloudMode: cloud mode calls deleteCloudAccount, while local mode keeps the existing logout_account command.
Hosted account add is driven by backend QR start/status APIs and session.connectCloud hydration, matching ADR-0006 session-host ownership.
Cloud device-token persistence is confined to command/cloud.rs, while the Svelte UI stores only the base URL and uses the non-secret keychain sentinel.

findings.evidence: cloud-zalo-session-host remains passes=false for live hosted QR/listen/send/restart proof.
findings.fix: No action for this desktop wiring scope.

summary: Architecture review pass: command-layer bridge, keychain-backed cloud session storage, Svelte helper, and session store branch keep the local/cloud boundaries aligned with ADR-0003 and ADR-0006.
